## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes and coverage thresholds held
- [ ] If a new check was added: listed in `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` taxonomy
- [ ] If a public API changed: entry in `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`, `refactor:`, `test:`)
